name: DOGE Balance Reclaim Continuation v1
edge_mechanism: trend pullback continuation after deeper value reclaim into structural support
thesis: DOGE 4h is the best primary lane for testing whether deeper pullbacks inside a transition-heavy choppy structure can still generate a tradable continuation leg once price reclaims fast value and stabilizes near structural support. The edge is the repair-and-go move, not blind trend worship.
invalidation_condition: Abort if repaired pullbacks remain too sparse, if reclaims repeatedly fail to extend after costs, or if the move is just mean-reversion noise with no continuation tail.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price pulls back into support inside a mixed range, reclaims fast value, confirms the reclaim, and then rotates far enough for a modest continuation leg.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Even in transition-heavy chop, repaired pullbacks can create short continuation bursts as inventory resets back toward balance. DOGE should express that clearly if the mechanism is real.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: DOGE 4h provides a dense enough primary lane for repaired pullback continuation while avoiding the lower-timeframe noise that has repeatedly killed sparse grammars.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: Reclaims may happen but fail to travel enough beyond value, turning the idea into weak chop noise after fees.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries trigger but second-leg travel is too shallow, shorten exits and reduce holding time before tightening reclaim conditions.
pre_submit_reasoning.expected_outcome_pattern: A workable number of repaired pullback entries with front-loaded exits carrying most expectancy.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_success: DOGE 4h plus one cross-lane show credible density and positive post-cost continuation after value reclaim.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_failure: 0 trades, low-trade mirage, or reclaimed pullbacks that stall immediately.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; pullback depth, reclaim, and recovery confirmation are complementary
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed by broad reclaim logic instead of ceremonial exact-bar triggers

validation_basket.why_included: Best control lane for repaired pullback continuation in the live basket.
validation_basket.continue_if: Reclaims occur often enough and extend after costs.
validation_basket.rotate_away_if: Reclaims remain sparse or fail immediately.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: Repeated repaired pullbacks with modest continuation travel.

validation_basket.why_included: Checks whether the mechanism survives on the similar major lane.
validation_basket.continue_if: ETH shows the same repaired-pullback continuation shape with usable density.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: Cleaner but similarly modest continuation legs.

validation_basket.why_included: Tests whether the same reclaimed-pullback idea survives on the more explosive lane.
validation_basket.continue_if: TAO preserves the mechanism without degenerating into chaos.
validation_basket.rotate_away_if: TAO becomes too noisy or anti-correlated.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: Bigger but less orderly continuation bursts than DOGE.
